data.current_description: Changes the name of an existing delivery group.
data.description_suggestion: Changes the name of an existing delivery group. Requires the group key as a path parameter and the new group name in the request body. Returns a status response confirming the rename operation. All group members will see the updated group name in their client applications.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks details about required inputs (group key parameter, new name in request body), what is returned (status response), and important side effects (name change visible to all group members). data.current_description: Pushes data to smartwatch or widget displays. At least one data field (title, text, subtext, count, or percent) is required.
data.description_suggestion: Pushes data to smartwatch or widget displays for real-time updates. Requires application token and user key. At least one data field (title, text, subtext, count, or percent) must be provided in the request. Returns a status response confirming successful glance delivery. Updates are immediately reflected on the user's smartwatch and widget displays.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions the data field requirement but omits critical input details (application token, user key) and output information (status response, immediate delivery confirmation). Enhanced description clarifies authentication requirements, input constraints, response format, and delivery behavior for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'migrateSubscription' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks essential details about required inputs (user key, application token), response content (new subscription key, status), and critical side effects (original key deactivation, irreversibility). Enhanced description provides AI agents with complete information about prerequisites, outcomes, and permanent state changes to ensure proper operation sequencing and user awareness.

data.current_summary: Migrate a user key to a subscription key
data.current_description: Migrates an existing Pushover user key to a subscription-based key for the application.
data.description_suggestion: Migrates an existing Pushover user key to a subscription-based key for the application. Requires the user key and application token in the request. Returns the new subscription key and migration status. After migration, the original user key becomes inactive and the subscription key must be used for all future operations. This is a one-way operation that cannot be reversed.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks essential details about required inputs (user key, application token), response content (new subscription key, status), and critical side effects (original key deactivation, irreversibility). Enhanced description provides AI agents with complete information about prerequisites, outcomes, and permanent state changes to ensure proper operation sequencing and user awareness.

data.current_description: Retrieves the status of an emergency priority notification including acknowledgment and expiration details.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the status of an emergency priority notification including acknowledgment count, expiration time, and callback information. Returns details about user acknowledgments and retry status. Used to track emergency message delivery and user responses.
data.reasoning: Description mentions 'acknowledgment and expiration details' but lacks specificity about what data is actually returned. Enhanced description clarifies the specific fields returned and explains the operational context for tracking emergency notifications.

data.current_description: Stops retry attempts for an emergency priority notification.
data.description_suggestion: Stops retry attempts for an emergency priority notification by receipt ID. Prevents further delivery attempts and notifications to the user. Returns confirmation of cancellation. Useful for stopping emergency alerts that are no longer needed.
data.reasoning: Description explains the action but lacks clarity on side effects and practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies what happens after cancellation (no further attempts), the confirmation response, and when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Cancels all active emergency priority notifications matching the specified tag.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels all active emergency priority notifications matching the specified tag. Stops retry attempts for all matching notifications and prevents further delivery attempts. Returns the count of cancelled notifications. Useful for bulk cancellation of related emergency alerts.
data.reasoning: Description explains what is cancelled but lacks clarity on side effects (stopping retries) and return value (count of cancelled items). Enhanced description clarifies the scope of cancellation, side effects, return information, and practical use case for bulk operations.

data.current_description: Changes the name of an existing delivery group.
data.description_suggestion: Changes the name of an existing delivery group. Requires the group key as a path parameter and the new group name in the request body. Returns a status response confirming the rename operation. All group members will see the updated group name in their client applications.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal. It lacks details about required inputs (group key parameter, new name in request body), what is returned (status response), and important side effects (name change visible to all group members). Enhanced description provides AI agents with complete context for operation execution and outcome expectations.

message: Operation 'sendGlance' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description mentions the data field requirement but omits critical input details (application token, user key) and output information (status response, immediate delivery confirmation). Enhanced description clarifies authentication requirements, input constraints, response format, and delivery behavior for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Pushes data to smartwatch or widget displays. At least one data field (title, text, subtext, count, or percent) is required.
data.description_suggestion: Pushes data to smartwatch or widget displays for real-time updates. Requires application token and user key. At least one data field (title, text, subtext, count, or percent) must be provided in the request. Returns a status response confirming successful glance delivery. Updates are immediately reflected on the user's smartwatch and widget displays.
data.reasoning: Current description mentions the data field requirement but omits critical input details (application token, user key) and output information (status response, immediate delivery confirmation). Enhanced description clarifies authentication requirements, input constraints, response format, and delivery behavior for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'migrateSubscription' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks essential details about required inputs (user key, application token), response content (new subscription key, status), and critical side effects (original key deactivation, irreversibility). Enhanced description provides AI agents with complete information about prerequisites, outcomes, and permanent state changes to ensure proper operation sequencing and user awareness.

data.current_summary: Migrate a user key to a subscription key
data.current_description: Migrates an existing Pushover user key to a subscription-based key for the application.
data.description_suggestion: Migrates an existing Pushover user key to a subscription-based key for the application. Requires the user key and application token in the request. Returns the new subscription key and migration status. After migration, the original user key becomes inactive and the subscription key must be used for all future operations. This is a one-way operation that cannot be reversed.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks essential details about required inputs (user key, application token), response content (new subscription key, status), and critical side effects (original key deactivation, irreversibility). Enhanced description provides AI agents with complete information about prerequisites, outcomes, and permanent state changes to ensure proper operation sequencing and user awareness.

data.current_summary: Validate a user or group key

data.description_suggestion: Validates whether a user or group key is valid and active. Returns associated devices, licenses, and subscription status. Useful for verifying recipient validity before sending messages.
data.reasoning: Description mentions 'devices and licenses' but lacks clarity on what specific information is returned and the practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies return values and explains when an AI agent should use this operation (pre-message validation).

data.current_description: Retrieves the status of an emergency priority notification including acknowledgment and expiration details.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the status of an emergency priority notification including acknowledgment count, expiration time, and callback information. Returns details about user acknowledgments and retry status. Used to track emergency message delivery and user responses.
data.reasoning: Description mentions 'acknowledgment and expiration details' but lacks specificity about what data is actually returned. Enhanced description clarifies the specific fields returned and explains the operational context for tracking emergency notifications.

message: Operation 'cancelEmergencyNotification' has semantic quality issues: missing_side_effects. Description explains the action but lacks clarity on side effects and practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies what happens after cancellation (no further attempts), the confirmation response, and when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_description: Stops retry attempts for an emergency priority notification.
data.description_suggestion: Stops retry attempts for an emergency priority notification by receipt ID. Prevents further delivery attempts and notifications to the user. Returns confirmation of cancellation. Useful for stopping emergency alerts that are no longer needed.
data.reasoning: Description explains the action but lacks clarity on side effects and practical use case. Enhanced description clarifies what happens after cancellation (no further attempts), the confirmation response, and when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'cancelEmergencyByTag' has semantic quality issues: missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Description explains what is cancelled but lacks clarity on side effects (stopping retries) and return value (count of cancelled items). Enhanced description clarifies the scope of cancellation, side effects, return information, and practical use case for bulk operations.

data.current_description: Cancels all active emergency priority notifications matching the specified tag.
data.description_suggestion: Cancels all active emergency priority notifications matching the specified tag. Stops retry attempts for all matching notifications and prevents further delivery attempts. Returns the count of cancelled notifications. Useful for bulk cancellation of related emergency alerts.
data.reasoning: Description explains what is cancelled but lacks clarity on side effects (stopping retries) and return value (count of cancelled items). Enhanced description clarifies the scope of cancellation, side effects, return information, and practical use case for bulk operations.
